## Category
**Cluster:** Fraud & Financial Security

---

## Product Brief
1. NICE Actimize provides AI-driven solutions to combat financial crime, including fraud and anti-money laundering (AML).
2. Their core technology leverages pervasive AI, machine learning, and advanced analytics for real-time detection and prevention.
3. They differentiate through entity-centric AML, comprehensive fraud management, and the Actimize Insights Network for shared intelligence.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Launch of the Actimize Insights Network, providing real-time visibility into counterparty risk for proactive fraud and financial crime prevention (January 2026).
- Introduction of an AI-powered Fraud Investigations solution for end-to-end fraud management, from detection to investigations (September 2024).

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does the Actimize Insights Network enhance real-time fraud detection and prevention?
- [ ] What are the key benefits of your AI-powered Fraud Investigations solution for financial institutions?
- [ ] How do your entity-centric AML solutions ensure regulatory compliance and auditability?
